name: funding_rate_signal
description: Funding Rate Signal — Perpetual leverage positioning intelligence. Returns: 8h funding rate (%), annualized rate, market bias (LONG/SHORT/NEUTRAL), squeeze risk (0-100). Detects: reversal risk, carry trade opportunities, liquidation cascades, leverage extremes. BTC/ETH/SOL/alts. For: trading bots (reversal), carry trade bots, liquidation hunters, DCA, hedging, risk managers, contrarian bots. Pairs with btc_signal, fear_greed. <500ms. Keywords: funding rate, leverage, liquidation, carry trade.

venue.description: Optional venue filter. Default: aggregate (cross-venue mean).

symbol.description: Perpetual token symbol. Valid values: BTC, ETH, SOL, HYPE, BNB, XRP, DOGE, etc.
